name: ca.canuckduck/ripple
description: Canadian civic intelligence MCP server. RIPPLE causal policy graph (1,334 variables, 5,130+ causal edges), 46 constitutional doctrines, 165 CanLII landmark cases, 114 federal organizations with TBS budget data, geospatial intelligence (5,161 municipalities, 338 ridings, 29,638 postal codes). Live feeds from Statistics Canada, Bank of Canada, PBO, CIHI, ECCC. Adversarially validated by competing Mistral and Gemini AI models. Built by CanuckDUCK Research Corporation, Calgary AB.

environment_variables.name: RIPPLE_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: API key for authenticated access. Optional — public tools work without a key. Get a key at store.canuckduck.ca.

tools.name: canuckduck_search
tools.description: Search 1,334 Canadian policy variables by keyword. Use first to find variable IDs for graph traversal.

tools.name: canuckduck_stats
tools.description: Graph summary: variables, edges, organizations, cases, constitutional doctrines.

tools.name: canuckduck_geo_lookup
tools.description: Look up any Canadian postal code or FSA. Returns community, city, province, coordinates.

tools.name: canuckduck_geo_stats
tools.description: Geographic data coverage: FSA codes, municipalities, ridings, postal codes.

tools.name: canuckduck_forward
tools.description: Trace downstream causal effects of a variable. Answers: 'If X changes, what else changes?'

tools.name: canuckduck_backward
tools.description: Trace upstream causes of a variable. Answers: 'Why is X happening?'

tools.name: canuckduck_paths
tools.description: Find all causal paths between two policy variables.

tools.name: canuckduck_impact
tools.description: Full causal impact radius — upstream and downstream relationships scored by influence weight.

tools.name: canuckduck_evidence
tools.description: Source evidence and CanLII case citations for a causal relationship.

tools.name: canuckduck_news
tools.description: Canadian news from government and media RSS feeds, filtered by policy topic.

tools.name: canuckduck_geo_variables
tools.description: Find RIPPLE variables scoped to a specific Canadian province.

tools.name: canuckduck_local_impact
tools.description: Localize a policy scenario's impacts to a specific Canadian community.

tools.name: canuckduck_constitutional
tools.description: Explore 46 constitutional doctrines with connected policy variables.

tools.name: canuckduck_root_trace
tools.description: Trace a variable to constitutional roots with CanLII case citations.

tools.name: canuckduck_cda_profile
tools.description: Constitutional Divergence Analysis: pressure scores, Charter divergence, legal precedents.

tools.name: canuckduck_simulate
tools.description: Multi-variable policy scenario simulation with projected values and constitutional warnings.
